settings.hero_text: WRYDECO celebrates handcrafted furniture made from solid natural wood. Each piece is a collectible expression of form, function, and the quiet beauty of nature.
settings.hero_image_alt: A gallery of sculptural natural wood furniture in a calm interior
settings.story_text:
Born from a deep respect for nature and tradition, WRYDECO creates sculptural furniture that brings warmth, soul, and calm into everyday life.

We work with solid hardwoods, selected for their strength and character, and shape each piece by hand with intention and care. Our designs are timeless—made not for trends, but to be lived with and passed on.

Transparency, honest materials, and meaningful relationships guide everything we do. This is our commitment to a more thoughtful way of living.
settings.story_image_alt: Solid natural wood dining furniture shaped to endure for generations
settings.proof_one_text: No veneers. No shortcuts. Just honest materials.
settings.proof_two_text: Shaped by skilled hands. Finished with care.
settings.proof_three_text: Furniture that ages beautifully and lasts for generations.
settings.team_intro: A small team with big respect—for wood, for craft, and for you.

settings.image_alt: Ngoc Vo in the WRYDECO workshop
settings.name: Ngoc Vo
settings.bio: Ngoc guides the creative vision with a thoughtful eye for materials, proportion, and the details that make a space feel personal.

settings.image_alt: Huan Ngo shaping a handcrafted solid wood piece
settings.name: Huan Ngo
settings.bio: Huan draws inspiration from nature’s forms to create sculptural designs that are both functional and timeless.

settings.image_alt: Trung Le hand-finishing natural wood in the workshop
settings.name: Trung Le
settings.bio: With generations of woodworking heritage, Trung brings precision, patience, and soul to every curve and surface.

settings.sourcing_intro: We source with care and act with responsibility—because great design begins with respect for the earth.
settings.heritage_text:
Our furniture is handcrafted in Vietnam by a network of master artisans and family-run workshops. With generations of woodworking knowledge, they shape each piece using time-honored techniques and deep respect for the material.

Every curve is carved, every edge is refined, and every finish is applied by hand. This is craftsmanship that carries culture, patience, and pride.
settings.heritage_image_alt: Vietnamese artisan hand-finishing a sculptural solid wood table
settings.cta_text: Have a question or a project in mind? We’d love to hear from you.

settings.heading: Solid, Natural Wood
settings.text: No veneers. Hardwoods only, chosen for beauty and strength.

settings.heading: Thoughtful Sourcing
settings.text: We work with trusted suppliers who share our values.

settings.heading: Ethical Production
settings.text: We partner with artisan workshops that value people and fair practices.

settings.heading: Made to Endure
settings.text: Timeless design and quality that reduce waste over time.
